'''zhazhuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enamelysin|enamelysin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-zh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enamelysin|enamelysin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhazhuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzhivith|zhæzhivith]] || [[word:zhæzhivij|zhæzhivij]] || [[word:zhæzhivish|zhæzhivish]] || [[word:zhæzhivi|zhæzhivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazhuzhuvuth|zhazhuzhuvuth]] || [[word:zhazhuzhuvuj|zhazhuzhuvuj]] || [[word:zhazhuzhuvush|zhazhuzhuvush]] || [[word:zhazhuzhuvu|zhazhuzhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazhuvuth|zhazhuvuth]] || [[word:zhazhuvuj|zhazhuvuj]] || [[word:zhazhuvush|zhazhuvush]] || [[word:zhazhuvu|zhazhuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazhufvuth|zhazhufvuth]] || [[word:zhazhufvuj|zhazhufvuj]] || [[word:zhazhufvush|zhazhufvush]] || [[word:zhazhufvuf|zhazhufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazhuvuthu|zhazhuvuthu]] || [[word:zhazhuvuju|zhazhuvuju]] || [[word:zhazhuvushu|zhazhuvushu]] || [[word:zhazhuvuku|zhazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazhuvuth|zhazhuvuth]] || [[word:zhazhuvuj|zhazhuvuj]] || [[word:zhazhuvush|zhazhuvush]] || [[word:zhazhuvu|zhazhuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazhuvuthul|zhazhuvuthul]] || [[word:zhazhuvujul|zhazhuvujul]] || [[word:zhazhuvushul|zhazhuvushul]] || [[word:zhazhuvukul|zhazhuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazhuvuthuthu|zhazhuvuthuthu]] || [[word:zhazhuvujuju|zhazhuvujuju]] || [[word:zhazhuvushushu|zhazhuvushushu]] || [[word:zhazhuvuku|zhazhuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazhuvuthun|zhazhuvuthun]] || [[word:zhazhuvujun|zhazhuvujun]] || [[word:zhazhuvushun|zhazhuvushun]] || [[word:zhazhuvukun|zhazhuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazhuvuthuoro|zhazhuvuthuoro]] || [[word:zhazhuvujuoro|zhazhuvujuoro]] || [[word:zhazhuvushuoro|zhazhuvushuoro]] || [[word:zhazhuvukuoro|zhazhuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
